title: Within-race rank postprocessing
summary: ROC AUC rewards ranking, and pit decisions are constrained within each race/lap/stint context.
rationale: ROC AUC rewards ranking, and pit decisions are constrained within each race/lap/stint context. FastF1 strategy examples emphasize comparing all drivers' stint strategies in a race, suggesting relative ordering features and rank-preserving postprocessing may matter more than calibrated probabilities.
implementation_hint: For each Race-LapNumber and Race-Stint group, add ranks/percentiles of TyreLife, LapTime_Delta, Cumulative_Degradation, Position, and pace deviation. After prediction, optionally monotone-rank adjust by blending model probability with percentile ranks of tyre age/degradation pressure inside Race/Compound/Stint.
expected_effect: Improves AUC by ranking likely stoppers above non-stoppers in the same strategic context, especially when absolute lap-time scales differ by race.
risk: Aggressive postprocessing can distort already-good model ranks; use small blend weights and check race-group validation, because random CV may overstate gains.
